title: The Family Story Shifting
subtitle: A visualisation for seeing the point where your family's money story changes and what that change looks like forward
excerpt: A short visualisation for the Day 77 theme of claiming a new wealthy family story. The scene moves through two pictures: the old story, and then the new one already in place. The aim is to make the shift feel visible and concrete rather than theoretical.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Lineage-shift imagery of this kind appears across therapeutic and coaching traditions. No single source is credited.

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 77 theme of claiming a new wealthy family story. The scene moves through two pictures: the old story and the new one. The aim is to make the shift visible and concrete.
Sit somewhere quiet. Close your eyes or soften your gaze. Two or three slow breaths.

Picture the money story you grew up inside. Not a judgement of it, just the texture of it. What was said about money in the house? What was the relationship between money and worry? What was the relationship between money and pride or shame? Let the picture be clear. You don't need to fix it here.
Now picture where you are standing. You are at the point on the line where the story changes. Behind you is the inherited version. In front of you is the new one. The line runs through you.

Look forward. See the money story your children are growing up inside. Or the one your family will grow up inside if you don't have children, whoever comes next, whoever is shaped by what you build and pass on. In this picture, money is ordinary and manageable. It is not a source of dread. Decisions about it are practical, not panicked. The children in the picture have the vocabulary for money that you had to learn as an adult.
You are the reason that picture is different from the one before it. Let that sit for a moment. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. Imagery that shifts a family story shows up in many coaching and therapy styles. No single source is claimed.
